final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing single large knowledge card illustration for children explaining the story of 赤壁之战 (Battle of Red Cliffs) from 三国.

Style/medium: needs a children's cartoon / illustrated storybook aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a single large card layout with a clear title at top, key story points listed with bullet markers on the side, and a cartoon narrative scene as the main body
Subject: must include the 赤壁之战 story from 三国, presented in child-friendly cartoon form
Scene/backdrop: must include a river battle scene evoking 赤壁 — fire, warships, and dramatic action rendered in a cartoon style
Lighting/mood: needs a dramatic yet playful children's-book atmosphere — exact light and mood treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a bright, vivid, child-friendly direction — exact color choices are yours
Materials/textures: needs an illustrated / flat-cartoon surface feel — exact texture and line weight are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "赤壁之战" as the main title; must include key story bullet points listed alongside the illustration (content: 曹操南下 / 孙刘联军 / 火烧赤壁 / 曹军大败)
Constraints: must preserve single-card format; title, bullet-point list, and cartoon scene must all be clearly separated and legible for children
Avoid:
